2237870.name: Biorganic
2237870.description:
ABOUT THIS GAME


You have to survive with your towers! Biorganic Planet is not safe to live on. The worms hate you to live there and so, you have to protect your life! Plant your tower and upgrade them to kill the worms and survive. Create unique builds and develop your towers. The worms might look cute but don’t trust them!

Features

  • Auto-firing towers
  • Fast runs
  • Many towers options
  • Many skill option to create unique builds
  • Different playable style possibilities
  • Collect coins to buy skills or new towers from the shop between waves of enemies
